summary: ClearDeal MVP full end-to-end testing completed. Backend 29/30 tests pass (1 transient 503 that resolved on retry). All core flows verified: auth, onboarding, billboard creation, deal workflow, negotiation, approval.

minor.issue: Intermittent 503 on invalid credential login (resolved on retry - likely transient infra issue). Correct 401 returned normally.

issues: Date picker uses browser native date input (mm/dd/yyyy format) instead of shadcn calendar component - inconsistent with design system

action_items: Minor: Replace native browser date picker in Make Offer modal with shadcn calendar component for design consistency
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~900 lines - could be split into routers/billboards.py, routers/deals.py, routers/companies.py for maintainability
No rate limiting on auth endpoints - brute force possible
JWT_SECRET has fallback value in code ('cleardeal-jwt-secret-key-2024') - should require env var in production
Billboard price benchmark shown in browse ('₹60,000 – ₹1,00,000') appears hardcoded/calculated from test data; verify this is intentional benchmark logic
seed_data_creation: Created test users: testowner@cleardeal.com (owner), testbrand@cleardeal.com (brand_manager). Created companies, billboard (ID: 167da8b7-0d07-43b0-b911-91686d489756), and deal (ID: 5225f758) in Pending Approval state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test credentials: testowner@cleardeal.com/test123 (owner with company+billboard) and testbrand@cleardeal.com/test123 (brand_manager with company). Existing deal 5225f758-eddd-40b8-9d30-020c414c422b in pending_approval state. All MOCKED APIs (GST/Aadhaar/Bank verification) working correctly. App URL: https://deal-bidding-hub.preview.emergentagent.com
